title: BalkanizationDefines
description: Tunable thresholds and multipliers for spec-070. Realized as a Pydantic BaseModel in src/babylon/config/defines/balkanization.py. All values have theoretical defaults from balkanization-spec.yaml v1.2.0 (research.md R-001 documents provenance).

metabolic_impact_intensify.description: FR-004 per-tick habitability change under INTENSIFY extraction.

metabolic_impact_continue.description: FR-004 per-tick habitability change under CONTINUE.

metabolic_impact_cease.description: FR-004 per-tick habitability change under CEASE.

secession_influence_threshold.description: FR-029a (2) — non-incumbent Faction must hold influence_level above this in each hex of the contiguous sub-region.

secession_hysteresis_ticks.description: FR-029c — predicate must hold for this many consecutive ticks before SECESSION_DECLARED fires.

min_contiguous_hex_count.description: FR-029b + R-004 — minimum H3 res-7 hex count for a secession sub-region. ≈ 1 county-equivalent area at res-7.

red_ogv_class_tension_floor.description: FR-032 — RED_OGV predicate requires class_tension below this.

red_ogv_habitability_floor.description: FR-032 — RED_OGV predicate requires aggregate_habitability below this.

red_ogv_slope_window_ticks.description: FR-032 — habitability slope is computed over this rolling window of ticks.

fragmented_collapse_min_sovereigns.description: FR-032a — minimum surviving Sovereign count for FRAGMENTED_COLLAPSE.

fragmented_collapse_min_duration_ticks.description: FR-032a — configuration must persist for at least this many ticks.

faction_victory_supermajority_threshold.description: FR-026 — Faction must hold this aggregate influence share to fire FACTION_VICTORY.

initial_post_collapse_control_level.description: FR-024 step 4 — new Sovereigns post-collapse-partition start at this control_level (not 1.0; consolidation takes time).

red_settler_trap_class_reduction_thresho.description: FR-034 — Faction with class_reduction above this AND colonial_stance ∈ {UPHOLD, IGNORE} triggers diagnostic.

revolutionary_victory_min_cross_divide_s.description: FR-031a — minimum number of active EdgeType.SOLIDARITY edges between settler-formation and non-settler-formation entities required for REVOLUTIONARY_VICTORY. Below this count, an ABOLISH-majority + extraction-stopped + habitability-stabilizing run routes to RED_OGV instead. Implements Constitution I.4 (George Jackson Bifurcation): revolution requires solidarity across the colonial divide.

liberal_imperial_influence_cap.description: FR-039 — clamp on FAC_LIBERAL_IMPERIAL's initial influence per hex (computed as complement of Restorationist + Workers' Congress shares). Prevents the soft-imperial pole from dominating the seed without player intervention.

projected_habitability_horizon_ticks.description: FR-036 + FR-051 — default horizon for SovereignProjection.projected_habitability extrapolation.
